internship_cpt_policies.description: Policies and procedures for expanding knowledge base by accepting an internship and receiving CPT approval.
eligibility_requirements: Must be in valid F-1 status
Must be enrolled in a Master's or Doctoral program
Must have been enrolled full-time for the preceding academic year (fall and spring semester)
Must be making normal progress toward degree completion
Must be enrolled in the appropriate CPT course

details.degree_requirements: Does not count toward degree requirements
details.purpose: Designates student as full-time at ISU while on internship

steps: Register for CPT related course (requires permission)
Apply for CPT in Cystart (requires two e-forms)
Advisor processing (Wait up to 10 working days)
Receive email from ISSO to pick up CPT authorization I-20
Start employment ONLY after receiving CPT authorization I-20 and reaching start date
Submit final report by due date

application_routing.student_request_eform: Route to HCI DOGE, Cody Fleming
application_routing.creative_component_ms_students_note: Use Tiffany Kayser as advisor on CPT forms

step_1.action: Email HCI@iastate.edu with required information in Word or PDF
required_info: Is this part-time or full-time CPT
Brief Description of Expected Work Activities
HCI Courses/Electives with Direct Relevance to Work Activities

permission_to_enroll_instructions.step_2: HCI Director of Graduate Education (DOGE) reviews request.
permission_to_enroll_instructions.step_3: Notification of approval or denial (with reason).

final_report.due_date: Approximately two weeks before the end of the semester
final_report.grading_consequence: Grade of F may be assigned if report is not submitted
content_requirements: WHERE you did the internship (including supervisory personnel names)
WHAT DATES you were at the internship
Statement on how this experience benefited you

special_notes: Only HCI 6970 or GRST 6980 permitted for internship/CPT use.
Full-time CPT (HCI 6970) allowed for one Summer/Fall OR Spring/Summer combination per year. Fall/Spring combination NOT permitted.
Must complete request process for each semester registered if requesting for permitted combinations.
Must submit Final Report for previous semester before additional internship course requests will be reviewed.
Grading is Satisfactory (S) / Fail (F) based on the one-page write-up.
